metadata.title: MiniAItura — AI YouTube Thumbnails
metadata.description: Describe your video and our AI generates the perfect thumbnail for your niche. Click-worthy YouTube thumbnails, no design skills needed.
metadata.ogDescription: Describe your video and AI generates the perfect thumbnail for your niche.
metadata.twitterDescription: Generate professional YouTube thumbnails with AI in seconds.
metadata.keywords: YouTube thumbnails | AI thumbnail generator | YouTube thumbnail maker | MiniAItura

pricingMeta.title: Plans & pricing
pricingMeta.description: Free plan with 1 thumbnail per day, or PRO plan with more generations, high resolution and unlimited gallery. Create professional YouTube thumbnails with AI.
pricingMeta.ogDescription: Compare the free plan and the PRO plan of MiniAItura.

landing.subtitle: Create amazing YouTube thumbnails with AI. Describe your video and let it do the work for you.

pricing.title: Plans & pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that best fits your thumbnail creation pace.
pricing.signInToSubscribe: Sign in to start your Pro subscription.
pricing.signInFirst: Sign in first to enable checkout.
pricing.signInRequired: Sign in is required before starting checkout.
pricing.syncFailed: Could not synchronize the payment. If the charge appears in Stripe, check the webhook or refresh in a few seconds.

meta.title: Gallery of community-made YouTube thumbnails
meta.description: YouTube thumbnails generated with AI by the MiniAItura community. Explore styles by niche and use them in your own thumbnails.
meta.ogDescription: Explore YouTube thumbnails generated with AI by the community.

galleryPublic.title: Gallery of community-made thumbnails
galleryPublic.subtitle: YouTube thumbnails generated with AI. Click to see the style.
galleryPublic.empty: There are no public thumbnails yet. Be the first to publish yours!
galleryPublic.styleUsedTimes: {count, plural, one {Style used # time} other {Style used # times}}

loader.fetchMode: Your thumbnail is being generated in low-priority mode. It may take several minutes.
loader.normal: Our mascots are adding the final touches.

settings.title: Your profile
settings.signInToView: Sign in to see your profile.
settings.willCancelOn: Your subscription will cancel on {date}. You'll stay PRO until then.
settings.upgradePitch: Go PRO for more generations, high resolution and publishing to the gallery.
settings.publicNameHint: 3–30 characters. Letters, numbers, hyphens, underscores and dots.
settings.cancelConfirm: Cancel your PRO subscription? You'll stay PRO until the end of the period you already paid for.
settings.cancelSuccess: Subscription canceled. You'll stay PRO until the end of the period.

galleryPersonal.title: My gallery
galleryPersonal.subtitle: Your generated thumbnails.
galleryPersonal.signInToView: Sign in to see your gallery.
galleryPersonal.deleteConfirm: Delete this thumbnail? This can't be undone.
galleryPersonal.empty: You don't have any thumbnails yet. Generate one and it'll show up here.
galleryPersonal.freeLimit: FREE plan: showing your last 30 thumbnails. Upgrade to PRO to see them all.

publishNotice.heading: When you publish to the community gallery:
publishNotice.bullet1: Your thumbnail will be publicly visible to anyone.
publishNotice.bullet2: Others will be able to copy your content and your style (separately or together) for their own thumbnails.
publishNotice.bullet3: You'll appear as the author with your public name.
publishNotice.footer: You can make it private again anytime from your gallery.

galleryDetail.styleUsedTimes: {count, plural, one {This style has been used # time} other {This style has been used # times}}

generate.totalSizeLimit: Total size limit of {mb} MB exceeded.
generate.writeTitleOrContent: Write a title or describe the video content first.
generate.signInToSuggest: Sign in to suggest a style.
generate.signInToGenerate: Sign in is required before generating.
generate.titleFieldSubtitle: optional — but it helps a lot to create the hook
generate.titleFieldPlaceholder: What's your video title? (the AI uses it for the hook)
generate.contentPlaceholder: Describe what appears in the thumbnail and what your video is about (the topic, the elements, the key moment)...
generate.contentTip: Tip: use [Image 1], [Image 2]… to refer to your reference images.
generate.stylePlaceholder: Describe the visual style: colors, lighting, composition, typography, mood...
generate.suggestTitle: The AI proposes a style based on your title and content
generate.fillFirst: Fill in the title or content first
generate.galleryStyleLoaded: Style loaded from the community gallery. You can edit it.
generate.dropHere: Drag and drop your images here, or
generate.refInstructionsPlaceholder: Instructions for this image (e.g. 'I want this face but surprised')
generate.freeOptionsNote: FREE plan: 512px and queued generation are automatic. Go PRO for more quality and resolution options.
generate.saverDesc:
Low-priority generation when available

-25 credits off the generation cost
generate.highQualityDesc:
More native detail, recommended for generating small text

+25 credits to the generation cost
generate.highResDesc:
Image resolution at 2K

+25 credits to the generation cost
